title: King of Dallas
overview: A dystopian world where Black Panther meets School Daze. Disgraced and Exiled, King Octavious is forced to be the leader he was bred to be in a world that has lost it's way. Set in Post Apocalyptic Dallas in the year 2097, people of African descent are the loan survivors of a global plague that killed 99.999% of the world's population. Instead of unifying in their similarities, the citizens of New Dallas have been torn apart due to their only difference...
